# CWE-184 negative: allowlist of permitted filter tokens
lang: go
file: CWE-184-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"regexp"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

var allowedFilter = regexp.MustCompile(`^[a-z0-9_]{1,32}$`)

// CWE-184 Incomplete List of Disallowed Inputs (mitigated)
func RunReportQuery(c *gin.Context) {
	sqlish := c.PostForm("filter")
	if !allowedFilter.MatchString(sqlish) {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "blocked"})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"accepted": sqlish})
}
